description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a long-sleeved shirt under a deep green vest with a subtle pattern, and black trousers. The figure has long, straight hair that falls past the shoulders and a full beard, giving a distinguished appearance. The hands are relaxed and open, and the posture is upright and neutral, as if standing at ease. The shoes are formal and match the overall sophisticated style of the outfit. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a tailored look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's expression is neutral.
description: A formally dressed adult male figure with long hair, a beard, a green vest, and black trousers, standing upright. The attire is tailored and sophisticated, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green vest, long-sleeved shirt, facial features, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the hair, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the long hair, and the fit of the vest and trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair length, and the side seam of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: formal shirt with a tailored vest and fitted trousers
